meta.title: Docx Viewer – Fast DOCX Reader for Android Phones & Tablets
meta.description: Fast Docx Viewer for Android phones and tablets with search, bookmarks, read aloud, OCR fallback, night mode, thumbnails, zoom, print, share, and password-protected DOCX support.
meta.keywords: Docx Viewer, Android Docx Viewer, DOCX reader Android, DOCX opener, DOCX search app, DOCX bookmarks, read aloud DOCX, OCR DOCX reader, Docx Viewer for phone, Docx Viewer for tablet, night mode DOCX, password DOCX reader
meta.author: Deepak PK

og.title: Docx Viewer for Android Phones & Tablets
og.description: Open, search, bookmark, listen to, print, and share DOCXs on Android phones and tablets with a fast modern DOCX reader.

twitter.title: Docx Viewer for Android Phones & Tablets
twitter.description: Fast Android DOCX reader with search, bookmarks, read aloud, OCR fallback, night mode, thumbnails, zoom, print, and share.

product.name: Docx Viewer
product.heroTitle: Docx Viewer – Fast DOCX Reader for Android Phones & Tablets
product.heroDescription: Open DOCX files from your phone, file manager, downloads, email attachments, or shared links. Search, bookmark, zoom, listen with read aloud, use OCR fallback for scanned pages, and continue from where you stopped.

features.title: Features Built for Android DOCX Reading

cards.title: Open DOCXs Anywhere
bullets: Open DOCX files from the app picker
Open DOCXs from file managers and external apps
Persist read access for SAF document URIs
Unlock password-protected DOCX files

cards.title: Recent Files & Resume
bullets: Recent files library with first-page thumbnails
Search recent files by name
Resume reading from the last page
Restore previous zoom level automatically

cards.title: Smooth Reading Controls
bullets: Smooth DOCX page rendering with lazy loading
Nearby-page high-resolution preloading
Pinch-to-zoom and double-tap zoom
Go to any page instantly

cards.title: Powerful DOCX Search
bullets: Search text inside DOCX documents
View result snippets with highlighted matches
Navigate quickly between search results
Find important content faster in long DOCXs

cards.title: Bookmarks & Thumbnails
bullets: Bookmark important DOCX pages
View bookmark thumbnails
Use thumbnail strip navigation
Remove recent files with confirmation

cards.title: Read Aloud with OCR
bullets: Listen with play, pause, previous, next, and stop controls
Tap to start reading from a selected word or sentence
Adjust speech rate, pitch, and voice
Use OCR fallback for scanned or image-only pages

cards.title: Comfort Reading Tools
bullets: Night mode for low-light reading
Margin crop for cleaner page viewing
Header, footer, and page number skipping during read aloud
Simple multi-column reading order detection

cards.title: Share, Print & Subscriptions
bullets: Share DOCX files from the app
Print DOCX files when supported by your device
Free preview experience with subscription unlock
Offline subscription cache with grace period

items.title: Students & Learners
items.text: Read notes, books, assignments, and study material with search, bookmarks, thumbnails, and read aloud support.

items.title: Professionals
items.text: Review reports, invoices, forms, manuals, and office documents with fast navigation and resume reading.

items.title: Everyday Readers
items.text: Open personal DOCXs, eBooks, manuals, and downloaded documents in a clean, comfortable reader.

items.title: Hands-Free Reading
items.text: Use read aloud, voice controls, and OCR fallback to listen to supported DOCXs and scanned pages.

items.q: How do I open DOCX files in Docx Viewer?
items.a: You can open DOCX files from the app picker, file managers, downloads, email attachments, shared links, and other external apps.

items.q: Does the app remember where I stopped reading?
items.a: Yes. Docx Viewer can restore your recent files, reading progress, last page, and zoom level.

items.q: Can I search inside DOCX files?
items.a: Yes. The app supports in-document text search with result snippets, highlighted matches, and quick result navigation.

items.q: Does read aloud work with scanned DOCXs?
items.a: Read aloud works best with DOCXs that contain selectable text. For scanned or image-only pages, OCR fallback helps detect text when supported.
Yes. Docx Viewer supports unlocking password-protected DOCX files.
Docx Viewer includes a free preview experience. Subscription options are available to unlock full-document viewing and extended reading access.

steps.title: Install Docx Viewer
steps.text: Download Docx Viewer on your Android phone or tablet.

steps.title: Open a DOCX
steps.text: Choose a DOCX from the app picker, file manager, downloads, email attachments, or shared links.

steps.title: Read, Search, Bookmark, or Listen
steps.text: Use zoom, thumbnails, bookmarks, page jump, search, night mode, and read aloud to work with your document.

cards.title: Fast & Modern
bullets: Fast DOCX opening and smooth rendering
Lazy loading with high-resolution nearby-page preloading

cards.title: Find Content Quickly
bullets: Text search with highlighted snippets
Go to page, thumbnails, and bookmark navigation

cards.title: Listen to DOCXs
bullets: Read aloud controls with voice customization
OCR fallback for scanned or image-only pages
